metadata.description: RavenClaude — a private marketplace of opinionated Claude Code plugins. A domain-neutral core (Team Lead + 14 specialist agents, 20 skills, hooks, the Capability Grounding Protocol, the Structured Output Protocol, and a comfort-posture permission dashboard) plus domain plugins that extend it via skills and knowledge. Every agent ships example-scenario frontmatter; the repo-guide surfaces an 'I want to…' use-case lookup across all plugins. Plugins: ravenclaude-core, power-platform (+ bundled pbix-mcp), finance, regulatory-compliance (+ BMA Bermuda specialist), web-design (WCAG/CWV/SEO), edtech-partner-success (PSM lane), data-platform (dashboard engagements). Salesforce on the roadmap.

plugins.name: ravenclaude-core
plugins.description: Domain-neutral Claude Code foundation: a Team Lead that dispatches 14 specialist agents (architect, backend/frontend/fullstack coders, code + security reviewers, tester-QA, data-engineer, project-manager, documentarian, designer, prompt-engineer, partner-success), 21 skills, format/lint/test gates, hooks, rules, and templates. Ships the Capability Grounding Protocol (pre-action environment + decision-tree checks, alternate-methods enumeration, honest blocked-reporting), the Structured Output Protocol for agent handoffs, a Researcher meta-skill for knowledge freshness, and a point-and-click comfort-posture dashboard that writes Claude Code permission rules — per layer (user/local/project) and per individual permission, on a 3-level deny/ask/allow scale, plus an opt-in command-review tribunal (the Thing) in early access for read-only commands. Slash commands include /init-agent-ready, /wrap, and /set-posture. Domain plugins extend core via skills + knowledge rather than parallel agents.

plugins.name: power-platform
plugins.description: Microsoft Power Platform specialist team — 11 specialists (Test Studio + DAX + pac solution check tester, PBIP-git + DAX + ADO power-bi-engineer, canvas/Power Fx, Power Automate + connectors, Dataverse modeling, model-driven apps, pac CLI + ALM, tenant governance/DLP, PCF, Copilot Studio + AI Builder, Power Pages). 18 skills spanning solution-check, DAX, ALM, BI, and maintainability review. House-opinions hook covers 8 mechanically-detectable §3/§4 violations. v0.11.0: first Mermaid decision tree in a knowledge file (PA flow recovery). v0.10.0: scenarios bank with 3 seed scenarios from the customer DEV engagement. **v0.12.0 — all 11 agents now ship example-scenario frontmatter** (audience + works_with + scenarios + quickstart), feeding the repo-guide's per-agent cards and Overview-tab use-case lookup. Bundles the community pbix-mcp server (d0nk3yhm/pbix-mcp, MIT) for Power BI .pbix/.pbit read/write/DAX-eval (requires `pip install pbix-mcp`).

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: Corporate finance & FP&A specialist team — FP&A analyst (budgets, forecasts, variance commentary), financial modeler (3-statement, DCF, scenarios), controller (close, JEs, reconciliations), treasury analyst (cash, covenants, FX), valuation analyst (DCF + comps + precedent), audit-prep specialist (PBC, walkthroughs, SOC1/2 narratives), and board-pack composer. 9 skills, 8 templates, 1 advisory hook (hardcoded rates, plaintext PII, missing Sources / Assumptions). Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.

plugins.name: regulatory-compliance
plugins.description: Financial-regulatory & compliance specialist team — AML/KYC analyst (sanctions, EDD, SAR/STR), regulatory-reporting analyst (FATCA/CRS, supervisory returns, Solvency II, BMA EBS), risk-and-controls specialist (three lines of defense, KRIs), policy & procedure writer, examination-prep specialist, and Bermuda-insurance specialist. 9 skills, 8 templates, 1 defensive PreToolUse hook (PII scrub — SSN/IBAN/credit-card/Bermuda TIN/wire instructions). Positioning reflects field experience inside a Tier-1 financial regulator (BMA). Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.

plugins.name: web-design
plugins.description: Web design & build specialist team — web architect (IA, stack, hosting), UX designer (wireframes, flows, conversion), visual designer (brand, typography, tokens), frontend implementer (HTML/CSS/JS, React, Astro, Next), content strategist (copy, microcopy, SEO content), accessibility auditor (WCAG 2.2 AA/AAA), and performance engineer (Core Web Vitals, image/font optimization). 9 skills (design-system audit, accessibility review, Core Web Vitals tuning, technical SEO audit, information architecture, conversion design, content audit, design-tokens scaffolding, third-party-script hygiene), 8 templates, 1 advisory hook, and a knowledge bank seeded with a curated 2026 reference set of "cutting edge yet simple" marketing-site donors (Linear, Vercel, Raycast, Resend, Cursor, v0, Tldraw, Cal.com) — visual-designer / ux-designer / frontend-implementer / web-architect all carry compact inline priors plus a pointer to the full brief. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.

plugins.name: edtech-partner-success
plugins.description: EdTech-flavored Partner Success Manager team — 6 specialist agents anchored on the PSM lane, with 12 skills, 15 templates, 1 advisory hook, and a 15-doc knowledge bank covering QBRs, success plans, health scoring, onboarding, adoption sequencing, 90-day implementation arcs, training programs, advocacy/reference pipelines, and renewal motions. Team expansion is expressed as skills + knowledge + templates rather than parallel agents (per the marketplace house rule). Primary-source citations carry retrieval dates and confidence notation. Vertical-explicit but segment-agnostic — fits K-12, higher-ed, corporate L&D, or mixed EdTech books. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols; requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.

plugins.name: data-platform
plugins.description: Data-platform team — 4 specialist agents (database-setup-guide, etl-pipeline-engineer, dashboard-builder, connector-developer) that guide cloud-database setup, ELT pipelines (Airbyte / Fivetran / n8n) with connectors for QuickBooks / Stripe / Salesforce / HubSpot / GA4 / Shopify / HRIS, and interactive dashboards (Evidence.dev / Superset / Metabase / Cube + Tremor) embedded in marketing sites and client apps. 11 skills — three invoked by ravenclaude-core/security-reviewer, one by its architect — implementing the house rule 'domain plugins extend core via skills, not parallel agents'. 12 templates, 1 advisory hook, and a 13-doc knowledge bank (landscape, RLS, QuickBooks, Power BI Embedded, plus per-connector deep-dives). Opinionated against per-viewer-priced BI tools (Looker / Tableau / Sigma) for SMB consulting; requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
